comment: "The method of teaching and demonstration of principles were found most interesting and the sequential nature of the modules has helped me to appreciate the principles of rectal polyp surveillance, the principles and guidelines for rectal cancer follow-up, evidence for blood tests and imaging review, and future treatments for rectal cancer, including understanding of the evidence."
"I found this course great course overall. Clear structure and valuable clinical content."
"I enjoyed the videos for the different options of rectal cancer surgery."
"I enjoyed this course's way of presenting information."
"I liked learning about early and advanced rectal cancer surveillance."
"I liked the illustrations and the interactive lessons."
